description: Originally launched in 2018, USD Coin (USDC) is the world’s 1st lawful USD-pegged stablecoin based in the United States of America. Now as a 1:1 USDC-pegged token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 USDC brings original USDC holders, users and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, unmatched TPS, and AI contract capability, making it a faster, more secure, and more scalable asset worldwide.
name: USDC on AtlantisChain
